subcodes.first_line: O people of Bahá! Hearken unto My call from the direction of My prison, and place your trust in all matters in God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل البهاء ان استمعوا ندائی من شطر سجنی و توکلوا فی کل الامور علی الله
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
